open.title: Frogfoot Outage | Nelspruit
open.description: Frogfoot has informed us of a network outage affecting Nelspruit, affected clients will experience limited to no connectivity. Frogfoot engineers are working on resolving this issue as soon as possible. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused.

updates.content: The maintenance team is continuing to investigate the remaining links that are down and is tracing the fibres to determine the root cause. We will share further updates as they become available.
Frogfoot technicians are on site again and continuing with splicing and repairs to restore service as soon as possible.
